SubscriptionHandle.description: Synchronous handle returned at subscription open time.
SubscriptionHandle.title: SubscriptionHandle

description:
Main-surface input for the ``subscribe`` primitive.

FR-011: ``lifetime_seconds`` ceiling = 31_536_000 (365 days).
FR-013: No inbound-receiver URL field (no webhook_url / callback_url).

lifetime_seconds.description: Bounded lifetime required (FR-011). Ceiling = 365 days. Harness releases resources on expiry (FR-014).
lifetime_seconds.title: Lifetime Seconds

params.description: Adapter-specific subscription parameters (e.g. region filter for CBS, polling_interval for REST pull, rss_feed_url for RSS 2.0). All URL fields in params are outbound-only (data source URLs).
params.title: Params

title: mock_cbs_disaster_v1
